text:
Tsunaida Te (つないだ手, Held Hands) is the third ending theme for the Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood anime series. It debuted in episode 27, replacing Let it Out. It is performed by Lil'B, and would later be replaced by Shunkan Sentimental in episode 39. It is also somewhat similar to the third ending Motherland in the first anime series, as it has many frames of Winry.

Video

Appearances

Winry Rockbell
Lan Fan
May Chang
Shao May

Lyrics (full)

{| border="0" cellspacing="0"
!

Original / Romaji Lyrics

! align="center"|

English Translation

|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Meguri megutte mo mata koko de aitai Hagurenai youni kono te wo tsunagunda
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|Though we meet from time to time, I want to see you here once more. I want to hold your hand, so I won't get lost.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Asahi ga noboru made katari atta ne Yuuhi ga shizumu made tsunaida te Kou yatte asu mo asatte mo tomo ni Ayumou hikari to kage
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|We'll talk until sunrise! We'll walk hand in hand until sunset! Let's stay like this until tomorrow and the day after, Like light and shadow, always together!
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|kimi wa sono mune ni nani wo kakae Donna sekai ni itandarou ima omou yo Samishige ni mitsumeru machi no naka de Nukumori wa hitori ja mitsukara nakute Ai ga konna ni tsuyosa ni naru koto Shittanda kimi ni deaete hajimete
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|I'm wondering now what you're keeping inside, and where you are right now. I'm scanning the city with lonely eyes, but I can't find warmth by myself. I first realized when I met you, how much strength love can give one.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Meguri meguttemo mata koko de aitai Hagurenai youni kono te wo tsunagunda Hitori ja nemurenai yume wa mirenai kara Donna fuan mo todokanai tokoroe Hoshi mo nai yoru mo terashi tsuzukeyou
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|Though we meet from time to time, I want to see you here once more. I want to hold your hand, so I won't get lost. I can't sleep alone; I can't dream at all. Let's go to that place where no worries can reach us. Let's shine on forever, even on starless nights.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Doko made mo yukeru kimi to nara Hitori ja arukenai michi mo futari nara Hana uta utai nagara arukerunda Kimi ga ireba shiawase
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|If I'm with you I can walk, no matter how far. Even on a road I can't walk on my own, If you're with me, I can hum along while we walk, I'll be so happy if you're here!
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Moshimo futari ga deatte nakatta nara Takusan no shiawase wo minogashiteta fFuan na toki wa gyutto shite kureta ne Asu wo miushinai sou na hitogomi no naka Ai ga kurushii hitori no jikan wa Samishisa wo gomakasu sube wo wasureteta ............................... 
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|If the two of us never met, I would never find this much happiness. That time I feel troubled, you hugged me tight, With that crowd of discouraged people surrounding us. Those times I'm alone with heartache, I feel so lonely I lost my way.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Nando mo kono te wo tsunagi naoshi nagara Donna michi datte isshoni arukunda Hitori ja kanawanai yume wo egaita nara Kimi to futari de kanae ni yukunda Kimi to hanbun hitotsu no shiawase
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|I'll keep grasping your hands again no matter how many times, and we'll walk side by side on whatever road we find. If I have a dream I can't make true on my own, I'll take you with me on a journey after it. You're a half of happiness to me.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Butsukarisou na kurai hito ooi doyoubi Miushitakunai kimi no sonzai Kono toki nibai ni chikara haitteru te ni Kanjita nukumori to ai NO MORE CRY
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|A Saturday with so many people jostling along, Oh no, I don't want to lose you! I squeezed your hand two times harder. I feel the warmth. I feel love. I'll cry no more!
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Asera JEANS no POCKET de hikatteru Kimi no keitai kizukasetakunai Damari komu watashi no naka no ko akuma Tada kimi ga inaito iya dakara...
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|Your mobile phone is shining in your jeans pocket. But there's a little demon inside me telling me to keep mum. There's a call, but I don't want to tell you about it at all! It's just that...I don't want you to leave.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Nanika ga ubai sarisoude kowai "Taisetsu na hito" to tsunagattetai Omoi wa dare ni mo makenai Sou kono machi ni kirawareru kurai Te wo tsunagou
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|I want to keep holding onto you Because I'm scared you will be taken away. I don't feel like losing to anyone. Let's join hands this way, and stand up against them all!
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Yowamu shi na hodo tsuyogatte shimau Demo muri da yo... naitemo ii ka na? Aki no kaze mou sugu deatta kisetsu Ano koro no watashi wa ai wo sagashiteta
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|I'm just a coward trying to seem strong, And it's useless. Maybe I could cry? That time when the autumn wind is soon to blow, I was searching for love then.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Meguri megutte mo mata kimi ni aitai Hagurenai youni kono te wo tsunagunda Hitori ja nemurenai yume wa mirenai kara Donna fuan mo todokanai tokoro e Hitori ja kanawanai yume wo egaita nara Kimi to futari de kanae ni yukunda
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|Though we meet from time to time, I want to see you here once more. I want to hold your hand, so I won't get lost. I can't sleep alone; I can't dream at all. Let's go to that place where no worries can reach us. If I have a dream I can't make true on my own, I'll take you with me on a journey after it.
|-
| class="romaji" nowrap="nowrap"|Kimi to hanbun hitotsu no shiawase
| class="translation" nowrap="nowrap"|You're a half of happiness to me.
|}
